positive: A sophisticated geometric pattern featuring interwoven stylized mountain peaks and crescent moons, rendered in a minimalist linocut style. The composition should use negative space effectively, creating a high-contrast, abstract tapestry. Colors should be deep indigo and creamy off-white, providing a sophisticated, earthy pop. The design must be centered and suitable for repeating tiling on fabric, with strong, clean silhouettes and bold lines. Highly detailed illustration, vector art quality, print-ready, perfect symmetry, graphic novel aesthetic.
